title: Lettuce at Taco Bell in 5 states confirmed as a source of diarrhea-causing parasite
description:
Federal health officials have identified lettuce from Mexico served at Taco Bell locations across five U.S. states, including Indiana, as a source of the widespread outbreak of diarrhea-causing parasite cyclospora.

title: Indiana purchases pricey hospitality suite for historic DC race
description: When IndyCar drivers take the green flag for a first-ever road course race around the National Mall in Washington, D.C., Indiana economic development officials will be entertaining guests in a $200,000 hospitality suite.
